title: 6FT Flower Garland String Lights, Battery Operated Fake Rose Vine Floral Garland with 20 LED Fairy Lights, Silk Hanging Pink Rose Light for Wedding Party Home Table Wall Decor (Pink)
features: Romantic Rose Garland Fairy Lights: Vivid and elegant rose flower fairy lights, the perfect combination of a garland and a string lights. You can unroll the each branch with little effort to create natural look as your prefer, then decorate the garland anywhere.

Premium Materials Flower String Lights: The flowers are made of rayon silk while stems and leaves are made of pvc. Totally 6ft length, comes with 12pcs flower heads and 20 led string lights. The flowers in 2 colors of the same color scheme, the addition of lights to the rose vines creates a warm and romantic atmosphere.

DIY Flexible Rose Vine Lights: Artificial garlands for decoration, it can be easily to bent into different shapes to fit your decorating needs, you can DIY any shapes in various spaces. Such as headstock, mirror, window, swings, wall corners, fireplace etc. The rose flower vine with warm lights make your home warm and bright.

Battery Powered: The flower garland and fairy lights have been Pre-assembled already, just install batteries into the battery box and it works. Powered by 2 AA batteries and steady on mode (battery not included).

Perfect for Home Decoration: Women will love these rose flower lights. The garland has a small hole at either end for hanging. Use rose garland lights for dates, birthday parties, weddings, valentine's day, anniversary and so on, to make your house more sweeter and romantic. As a festive atmosphere light, rose garland light is a good choice for decorations.
description: Product Description buywin Lifelike Rose Garland Fairy String Lights! Product Features fairy string lights Bulbs: 20 LEDs Timer: 16 hours off/ 8 hours on Lights Color : Warm white Powered: 3x AA Batteries (NOT INCLUDED) Specifications rose garland Style: Multicolored Rose Flower Garland Total Length : 2m/6.56 ft Flower Size: 7cm/2.8in Dia Flower Qty: 12 PCS Flower Color : purple pink and white High Quality Materials Soft leaves and silk flowers with 3D printing, stems is made of EVA plastic, looks natural and lifelike. Flexible & Portable Cute and warm garland light for indoor & covered outdoor use. Easily set or wrap, can be hanging anywhere. Natural-looking Flowers This garland is made of artificial flowers but natural-looking. They don't need to be cared for like real flowers, it won't wither and it won't fade, will always bloom in your place. Easy to Install All along the garland is twisted a copper wire containing tiny micro LEDs in a warm white colour, which make the garland appear to glow and twinkle. Battery Power Upgrade the battery box with a timer function, OFF/Timer/ON, 3 modes. Required 3 x AA batteries(Not included) Multiple Ways of Use Can be used in room, garden, hotel, balcony as a decoration. You can hang it on the wall, doors, swing, fence and anywhere as you like.
